name: skyeroutex-workforce-command
description: SkyeRoutexFlow Workforce Command - closure pass with proof media storage abstraction, export packets, stronger Routex/payment/dispute/browser proof, and production-storage scaffolding.

scripts.smoke:all: npm run smoke:browser && npm run smoke:browser-clicks && npm run smoke:routex && npm run smoke:storage && npm run smoke:storage:s3 && npm run smoke:integrations && npm run smoke:webhooks && npm run smoke:native-providers && npm run smoke:provider-webhooks && npm run smoke:runtime-bus && npm run smoke:guards && npm run smoke:security && npm run smoke:integrity && npm run smoke:audit-chain && npm run smoke:auth-control && npm run smoke:admin-invites && npm run smoke:migrations && npm run smoke:reset && npm run smoke:deploy && npm run smoke:mount
